description: Create and activate a 'Participatory Budgeting' survey for the 'Springfield 2026 Budget Consultation'. The survey must include a 'Budget Allocation' question group containing a 'Multiple Numerical Input' question (Code: BUDGET) asking 'Please allocate 100% of the discretionary budget across these sectors:'. This question should use a slider layout, include sub-questions for Public Safety (SAFE), Infrastructure (INFRA), Parks & Recreation (PARK), Health Services (HLTH), and General Government (GOV), and enforce a validation rule where the total sum must equal 100. Additionally, include a 'Long free text' question (Code: REASON) asking 'Please explain your focus on Infrastructure.' that is conditionally visible only when the Infrastructure (INFRA) allocation is greater than 40.
